title: Prompt Security, Untrusted Context, Privacy, and Authorization
description: Harden a tool-using prompt that processes untrusted documents and external results. Learners cumulatively produce a prompt threat model and red-team suite through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate trusted instructions from untrusted data and label authority boundaries.
Recognize direct and indirect prompt injection and prevent authority escalation.
Exclude secrets and irrelevant proprietary context and minimize tool privileges.
